name: Rocket's Mission
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Discard a card from your hand. Then, draw 3 cards. If you discarded a Pokémon that has Dark or Rocket's in its name, draw 4 cards instead.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.

attacks.text: Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

name: Noivern

attacks.name: Boomburst
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.text: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.text: During your next turn, each of this Pokémon's attacks does 30 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

name: Solgaleo ◇

attacks.name: Radiant Star
attacks.text: For each of your opponent's Pokémon in play, attach a Metal Energy card from your discard pile to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Corona Impact
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: This Pokémon is said to be a male evolution of Cosmog. At the activation of its third eye, it departs for another world.

name: Professor Elm's Training Method
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.text: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: It pulls up its shed skin to protect itself while it kicks. The bigger the crest, the more respected it is.

name: Energy Search
rules: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Protective Orb
rules: Attach Protective Orb to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If the Pokémon Protective Orb is attached to is a Basic Pokémon or Pokémon-ex, discard Protective Orb.
As long as Protective Orb is attached to a Pokémon, that Pokémon has no Weakness.

name: Regigigas

abilities.name: Earthen Awakening
abilities.text: Whenever you attach an Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon, heal 20 damage from it.

attacks.name: Gigas Punch
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

name: Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND
rules: Put this card from your hand onto your Bench only with the other half of Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND.
When this Pokémon has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Space Virus
abilities.text: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack of Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Ozone Buster
attacks.text: Discard all Fire Energy attached to Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND.

name: Murkrow
rules: Dusk Stone: Murkrow can evolve during the turn you play it.

attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

name: Axew

attacks.name: Dual Chop
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.

name: Pokémon Communication
rules: Choose 1 Pokémon in your hand, show it to your opponent, and put it on top of your deck. If you do, search your deck for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Hiker
rules: Look at the top 5 cards of either player's deck and choose 1 of them. That player shuffles the other cards back into their deck. Then, put the card you chose on top of that deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Minccino

attacks.name: Cleaning Up
attacks.text: Discard a Pokémon Tool card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavorText: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

name: Bebe's Search
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Choose a card from your hand and put it on top of your deck. Search your deck for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. (If this is the only card in your hand, you can't play this card.)

name: Tyranitar-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Break Ground
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Metal Energy
rules: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a Basic card.)

name: Mega Turbo
rules: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Mega Evolution Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Quick Ball
rules: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Pokémon. Show that Pokémon to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other revealed cards back into your deck. (If you don't reveal a Pokémon, shuffle all the revealed cards back into your deck.)

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Scott
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Search your deck for up to 3 cards in any combination of Supporter cards and Stadium cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Energy Removal 2
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and discard it.

name: Wailmer

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Wailmer but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: Wailmer does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: On sunny days, it lands on beaches to bounce like a ball and play. It spouts water from its nose.

name: Natu

attacks.name: Lost March
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon, except ◇ (Prism Star) Pokémon, in the Lost Zone.

flavorText: It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.

name: Mandibuzz

attacks.name: Dual Cut
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It makes a nest out of the bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

name: Fraxure

attacks.name: Dual Chop
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they've been fighting.

name: Misdreavus

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.text: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking. Look at the card you chose, then have your opponent shuffle that card into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It loves to sneak up on people late at night, then startle them with its shrieklike cry.

name: Trevenant

attacks.name: Perplexing Forest
attacks.text: You may have your opponent switch their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shadow Impact
attacks.text: Put 4 damage counters on 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It's feared as a ghost of the forest. Lumberjacks bring along Fire types, which Trevenant hates, when they enter the forest.

name: Super Potion
rules: Heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, discard an Energy attached to that Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Spook
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Donphan

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.text: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take long to grow.

name: Diglett
flavorText: If a Diglett digs through a field, it leaves the soil perfectly tilled and ideal for planting crops.

name: Gust of Wind
rules: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with his or her Active Pokémon.

name: Conductive Quarry
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Once during each player's turn, the player may flip a coin. If heads, that player searches his or her discard pile for a Lightning or Metal Energy card, shows it to the opponent, and puts it into his or her hand.

name: Sandshrew

attacks.name: Sand-attack
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

flavorText: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: Claw Fossil
rules: Play Claw Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Claw Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (as well as a Trainer card). Claw Fossil has no attacks of its own, can't retreat, and can't be affected by any Special Conditions. If Claw Fossil is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Claw Fossil from play.

abilities.name: Jagged Stone
abilities.text: If Claw Fossil is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Claw Fossil is Knocked Out), put 1 damage counter on the Attacking Pokémon.

name: Rayquaza Spirit Link
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Rayquaza-EX.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Cycle Draw
attacks.text: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Tornado Kick
attacks.text: If you played Bea from your hand during this turn, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavorText: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

name: Noctowl

attacks.name: Powerful Vision
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Its eyes are specially developed to enable it to see clearly even in murky darkness and minimal light.

name: Thundurus-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Raiden Knuckle
attacks.text: Attach an Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Team Plasma Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderous Noise
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Multi Energy
rules: Attach Multi Energy to 1 of your Pokémon. While in play, Multi Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.) Multi Energy provides Colorless Energy when attached to a Pokémon that already has Special Energy cards attached to it.

name: Solgaleo-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Ultra Road
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sunsteel Strike
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sol Burst-GX
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 5 Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Gible

attacks.name: Push Down
attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.

name: Energy Switch
rules: Move a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Dialga-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Reverse Edge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Fast Forward
attacks.text: For each Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

name: Entei & Raikou LEGEND
rules: Put this card from your hand onto your Bench only with the other half of Entei & Raikou LEGEND.
When this Pokémon has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Detonation Spin
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy attached to Entei & Raikou LEGEND.

attacks.name: Thunder Fall
attacks.text: Discard all Energy attached to Entei & Raikou LEGEND. This attack does 80 damage to each Pokémon that has any Poké-Powers (both yours and your opponent's). This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

name: Staravia
flavorText: They maintain huge flocks, although fierce scuffles break out between various flocks.

name: Loudred

attacks.name: Energy Press
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It shouts loudly by inhaling air, and then using its well-developed stomach muscles to exhale.

attacks.name: Ice Punch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Powder Snow
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Xatu

attacks.name: Energy Gaze
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals their hand. If you find any Energy cards there, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

name: Spearow

attacks.name: Mirror Move
attacks.text: If Spearow was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Spearow to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speeds to stay airborne.

name: Darkrai-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Restoration
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is in your discard pile, you may put it onto your Bench. Then, attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dark Cleave
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Dead End-GX
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, that Pokémon is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Dusk Mane Necrozma-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Meteor Tempest
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sun's Eclipse-GX
attacks.text: You can use this attack only if you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Mandibuzz

attacks.name: Trash Crash
attacks.text: Discard an Item card from your hand. If you do, this attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Brave Bird
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: It circles in the sky, keeping a keen eye out for Pokémon in a weakened state. Its choicest food is Cubone.

name: Chatot

attacks.name: Tone-Deaf
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Its tongue is just like a human's. As a result, it can cleverly mimic human speech.

name: Marshadow & Machamp-GX
rules: TAG TEAM rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during their last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Acme of Heroism-GX
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), and if it would be Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during their next turn, it is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Sitrus Berry
rules: Attach Sitrus Berry to 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has Dark or an owner in its name) that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If the Pokémon Sitrus Berry is attached to is Pokémon-ex or has Dark or an owner in its name, discard Sitrus Berry.
At any time between turns, if the Pokémon this card is attached to has at least 3 damage counters on it, remove 3 damage counters from it. Then, discard Sitrus Berry.

name: Braviary

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Sky Drop
attacks.text: This attack does 120 damage minus 20 damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

name: Helix Fossil
rules: Play Helix Fossil as if it were a Colorless Basic Pokémon. (Helix Fossil counts as a Trainer card as well, but if Helix Fossil is Knocked Out, this counts as a Knocked Out Pokémon.) Helix Fossil can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat. At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Helix Fossil from play. (This doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Aqua Reaction
abilities.text: When you attach a Water Energy card from your hand to Helix Fossil (excluding effects of attacks or Poké-Powers), search your deck for a card that evolves from Helix Fossil and put it onto Helix Fossil (this counts as evolving Helix Fossil). Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: M Aggron-EX
rules: Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Megaton Slam
attacks.text: You may flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 120 more damage. If tails, this attack does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Clefairy

attacks.name: Follow Me
attacks.text: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Its adorable behavior and appearance make it popular with men and women, young and old. Its numbers are few, however.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Alcremie

attacks.name: Decorate
attacks.text: Attach any number of basic Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Draining Kiss
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it's decorated with cream.

name: Diglett
flavorText: If a Diglett digs through a field, it leaves the soil perfectly tilled and ideal for planting crops.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.text: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

name: Professor Cozmo's Discovery
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Flip a coin. If heads, draw the bottom 3 cards of your deck. If tails, draw the top 2 cards of your deck.

name: Ancient Technical Machine [Ice]
rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name) in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Ancient Technical Machine [Ice].

attacks.name: Ice Generator
attacks.text: Discard all of your opponent's Trainer cards in play. If you do, prevent all effects, including damage, done to the Pokémon using this attack during your opponent's next turn.

name: Clefable

attacks.name: Moon Barrier
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon by Dragon Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tumbling Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Haxorus

attacks.name: Dual Chop
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.

name: Mawile

attacks.name: Mining
attacks.text: Search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. If that card is a Pokémon Tool card, instead of putting it into your hand, you may attach it to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

attacks.name: Bite Off
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon-GX or a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 30 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Attached to its head is a huge set of jaws formed by horns. It can chew through iron beams.

name: Rocket's Poké Ball
rules: Search your deck for a Pokémon with Dark in its name, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Potion
rules: Remove up to 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Cinccino

attacks.name: Tail Slap
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.text: Does 20 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.

name: Aromatisse

abilities.name: Fairy Transfer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Fairy Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.

attacks.name: Sleight of Hand
attacks.text: Choose up to 3 cards from your hand and put them on top of your deck. Then search your deck for that many basic Energy cards. Show those cards to your opponent, then put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Oricorio-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dance of Tribute
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, you may draw 3 cards. You can't use more than 1 Dance of Tribute Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Strafe-GX
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Yanma

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy attached to Yanma.

flavorText: It can hover is one spot by flapping its wings at high speed. It flits about to guard its territory.

name: Ecogym
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Whenever an attack, Pokémon Power, or Trainer card discards another player's non-Colorless Energy card from a Pokémon, return that Energy card to its owner's hand. (Energy cards that are discarded when that Pokémon is Knocked Out don't count.)

name: Arceus

attacks.name: Gather Light
attacks.text: Move as many Energy as you like from your Benched Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Judgment Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each different type of basic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.

name: Switch
rules: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Twins
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
You may use this card only if you have more Prize cards left than your opponent. Search your deck for any 2 cards and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND
rules: Put this card from your hand onto your Bench only with the other half of Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND.
When this Pokémon has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Space Virus
abilities.text: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack of Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Ozone Buster
attacks.text: Discard all Fire Energy attached to Rayquaza & Deoxys LEGEND.

name: Hawlucha

attacks.name: Skyward Kick
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: With its wings, it controls its position in the air. It likes to attack from above, a maneuver that is difficult to defend against.

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Cubone

attacks.name: Bonemerang
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: When it thinks of its dead mother, it cries. Its crying makes the skull it wears rattle hollowly.

name: Shaymin-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Synthesis
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Grass Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Revenge Blast
attacks.text: Does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Bertha's Warmth
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Remove 5 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon SP.

name: Skarmory

attacks.name: Cargo Jet
attacks.text: Discard a Team Plasma card from your hand. if you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Steel Wing
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Its heavy-looking iron body is actually thin and light, so it can fly at speeds over 180 mph.

name: Onix

attacks.name: Tunneling
attacks.text: Choose up to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Onix can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: When it travels underground, it causes rumbling and tremors. It can move at 50 mph.

name: Snubbull

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Small Pokémon flee from its scary face. It is, however, considered by women to be cute.

name: M Tyranitar-EX
rules: Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

ancientTrait.name: θ Double
ancientTrait.text: This Pokémon may have up to 2 Pokémon Tool cards attached to it.

attacks.name: Destroyer King
attacks.text: This attack does 60 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Natu

attacks.name: Bothering Wave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Future Sight
attacks.text: Look at the top 5 cards of either player's deck and put them back on top of that player's deck in any order.

flavorText: It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.

name: Sidney's Stadium
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.
Each player's Darkness Pokémon can't be Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

name: Garchomp

attacks.name: Mach Cut
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragonblade
attacks.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

flavorText: It is said that when one runs at high speed, its wings create blades of wind that can fell nearby trees.

name: Giratina

abilities.name: Dimension Breach
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fade to Black
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Dugtrio

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Flabébé

attacks.name: Secret Blessings
attacks.text: Shuffle 3 in any combination of Pokémon and basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

flavorText: When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind's embrace with an untroubled heart.

attacks.name: Deep Dive
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, remove 1 damage counter on Wooper.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Lickitung

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Its long tongue, slathered with a gooey saliva, sticks to anything, so it is very useful.

attacks.name: Haunt
attacks.text: Put a damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Riolu

attacks.name: Steady Punch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

flavorText: It has the peculiar power of being able to see emotions such as joy and rage in the form of waves.

name: Scizor

attacks.name: Steel Slash
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Pokémon-EX.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike during your next turn.

flavorText: It raises its pincers with eyelike markings for intimidation. It also swings them down dangerously.

name: Energy Link
rules: Attach Energy Link to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

As long as Energy Link is attached to a Pokémon, you may move an Energy card attached to that Pokémon to another of your Pokémon that has Energy Link attached to it. You may use this effect as often as you like during your turn.

name: Vulpix

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Vulpix in order to use this attack.

flavorText: As it grows older, its white tail changes colors and splits into six different tails. Its body radiates a faint warmth.

name: Potion
rules: Remove 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon (remove 1 damage counter if that Pokémon has only 1).

name: Professor Oak's Research
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw 5 cards.

attacks.name: Lick
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fade Out
attacks.text: Return Sabrina's Gastly and all Energy cards attached to it to your hand. (Discard all other cards attached to Sabrina's Gastly.)

name: Marshadow

abilities.name: Let Loose
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may have each player shuffle their hand into their deck and draw 4 cards.

attacks.name: Shadow Punch
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.

name: Lady
rules: Search your deck for up to 4 basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Magnezone-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Dual Bullet
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Sceptile ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Green Heal
attacks.text: Remove 4 damage counters from each of your Pokémon that has Grass Energy attached. If that Pokémon has less than 4 damage counters, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. The Defending Pokémon can't retreat until the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.text: Sceptile ex can't use Slashing Strike during your next turn.

name: Pokémon Reversal
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon, and switch it with your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Super Scoop Up
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, return 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

name: Kingdra ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Genetic Memory
attacks.text: Use any attack from Kingdra ex's Basic Pokémon card or Stage 1 Evolution card. (Kingdra ex doesn't have to pay for that attack's Energy cost.)

attacks.name: Hydrocannon
attacks.text: Does 50 damage plus 20 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Kingdra ex but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

name: Gible
flavorText: It attacks using its huge mouth. While its attacks are powerful, it hurts itself out of clumsiness, too.

name: Audino

attacks.name: Powerful Slap
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Heal Pulse
attacks.text: Heal 50 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: Its auditory sense is astounding. It has a radar-like ability to understand its surrounding through slight sounds.

name: Minccino
flavorText: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: A plan was recently announced to gather many Pikachu and make an electric power plant.

name: Raikou & Suicune LEGEND
rules: Put this card from your hand onto your Bench only with the other half of Raikou & Suicune LEGEND.
When this Pokémon has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt Spear
attacks.text: Raikou & Suicune LEGEND does 50 damage to itself and don't apply Weakness to this damage.

attacks.name: Aurora Gain
attacks.text: Remove 5 damage counters from Raikou & Suicune LEGEND.

name: Professor Elm's Training Method
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Search your deck for an Evolution card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Ponyta
flavorText: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything flat in moments.

attacks.name: Energy Patch
attacks.text: Take a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and attach it to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Syncroblast
attacks.text: If Girafarig and the Defending Pokémon don't have the same number of Energy cards attached to them, this attack's base damage is 10 instead of 40.

name: Piplup

attacks.name: Water Splash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

flavorText: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: Exploud

attacks.name: Boomburst
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Its howls can be heard over six miles away. It emits all sorts of noises from the ports on its body.

name: Bouffalant

attacks.name: Double Stomp
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.

name: Palkia-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dimension Heal
attacks.text: Heal from this Pokémon 20 damage for each Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Druddigon

abilities.name: Rough Skin
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 2 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It races through narrow caves, using its sharp claws to catch prey. The skin on its face is harder than a rock.

attacks.name: Lazy Attack
attacks.text: Sabrina's Slowpoke is now Asleep (after doing damage).

name: Energy Removal 2
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and discard it.

name: Space Center
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.
Ignore Poké-Bodies for all Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name).

name: Nidoran ♂

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Poison Skin
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It scans its surroundings by raising its ears out of the grass. Its toxic horn is for protection.

name: Switch
rules: Switch 1 of your own Benched Pokémon with your Active Pokémon.

name: Sandshrew

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: It lives in areas of limited rainfall. When danger approaches, it curls up into a ball to protect its soft stomach.

name: Clefable

attacks.name: Lullaby
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Meteor Mash
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Meteor Mash attack does 60 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: They don't like to reveal themselves in front of people. They live quietly in packs deep in the mountains.

name: Darkrai-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Restoration
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is in your discard pile, you may put it onto your Bench. Then, attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dark Cleave
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Dead End-GX

name: Magearna

name: Psyduck

attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Psyduck but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Stretch Tail

attacks.text: Return Aipom and all basic Energy cards attached to it to your hand. If you have no Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.

name: Miltank

attacks.name: Max Milk
attacks.text: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon. Then, discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said that kids who drink Miltank's milk grow up to become hearty, healthy adults.

name: Solid Rage
rules: Attach Solid Rage to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If the Pokémon Solid Rage is attached to is a Basic Pokémon or Pokémon-ex, discard Solid Rage.
If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, the Pokémon that Solid Rage is attached to does 20 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Probopass

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Reinforced Nose
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: It freely controls three small units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.

name: EXP.ALL
rules: Attach EXP. ALL to 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name) that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

During your opponent's turn, if 1 of your Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by your opponent's attack, you may take 1 basic Energy card attached to that Knocked Out Pokémon and attach it to the Pokémon with EXP.ALL attached to it. If you do, discard EXP.ALL.

name: Pikachu-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.text: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Energy cards you discarded.

name: Bouffalant

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Head Charge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

name: Suicune ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Energy Flip
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. You may move an Energy card attached to that Pokémon to another of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Reverse Stream
attacks.text: You may return all basic Energy cards attached to Suicune ex to your hand. If you do, this attack does 50 damage plus 10 more damage for each basic Energy card you returned.

name: Garchomp

attacks.name: Sand Tomb

name: Strength Charm
rules: Attach Strength Charm to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

Whenever an attack from the Pokémon that Strength Charm is attached to does damage to the Active Pokémon, the attack does 10 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Discard Strength Charm at the end of the turn in which this Pokémon attacks.

name: Rocket's Tricky Gym

Each Pokémon with Dark or Rocket's in its name (both yours and your opponent's) can use attacks on this card instead of its own.

attacks.name: Feint Attack

name: Larvitar

name: Togekiss-EX

attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Latias ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

name: Alph Lithograph

name: Revive
rules: Put a Basic Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.

attacks.name: Clutch

attacks.name: Sky Hunting
attacks.text: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by the damage from this attack, switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Flint's Willpower
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Attach a basic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon SP.

When this Pokémon has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.text: Raikou & Suicune LEGEND does 50 damage to itself and don't apply Weakness to this damage.

name: Dugtrio

name: Ponyta

name: Skarmory

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Double Rainbow Energy
rules: Double Rainbow Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). While in play, Double Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides 2 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.) Damage done to your opponent's Pokémon by the Pokémon Double Rainbow Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance). When the Pokémon Double Rainbow Energy is attached to is no longer an Evolved Pokémon, discard Double Rainbow Energy.

name: Altaria ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Mist
abilities.text: Any damage done to Altaria ex by attacks from Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Dragon Mist
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Phanpy

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Phanpy.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: Phanpy does 10 damage to itself.

name: Minccino

attacks.name: Last Resort
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Indeedee

attacks.name: Replenish Time
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: These intelligent Pokémon touch horns with each other to share information between them.

name: Cinccino

attacks.name: Last Resort
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Cacturne

attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Poison Fang
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Professor Oak's New Theory
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

name: Arceus LV.X

Put this card onto your Active Arceus. Arceus LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

abilities.name: Multi-type
abilities.text: Arceus LV. X's type is the same type as its previous Level.

abilities.name: Omniscient
abilities.text: Arceus can use the attacks of all Arceus you have in play as its own. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

name: Toxicroak-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Smash Uppercut
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

name: Broken Ground Gym
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.
Each player pays Colorless more to retreat a Baby Pokémon or Basic Pokémon.

name: Deoxys-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Power Connect
abilities.text: Your Team Plasma Pokémon's attacks (excluding Deoxys-EX) do 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Venusaur-EX.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Snubbull

attacks.name: Reckless Charge

rules: Rescue Energy provides Colorless Energy. If the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack, put that Pokémon back into your hand. (Discard all cards attached to that Pokémon.)

name: Latias

abilities.name: Flight Support
abilities.text: Your Latios in play have no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Misty Gale
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Reshiram-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 50 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Daunt
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 40 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.text: Discard a Supporter card from your hand. If you do, use the effect of that card as the effect of this attack.

attacks.text: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon and put 2 damage counters on each of them.

name: Giratina-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Renegade Pulse

attacks.text: Your opponent can't play any Pokémon Tool, Special Energy, or Stadium cards from his or her hand during his or her next turn.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

abilities.text: Sabrina's Gastly gets +10 HP for each Psychic Energy card attached to it. This power works even if Sabrina's Gastly is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

name: Warp Point
rules: Your opponent switches 1 of his or her Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any. You switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon, if any.

name: Steven's Advice
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Draw a number of cards up to the number of your opponent's Pokémon in play.
If you have 7 or more cards (including this one) in your hand, you can't play this card.

name: Strength Charm
rules: Attach Strength Charm to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

Whenever an attack from the Pokémon that Strength Charm is attached to does damage to the Active Pokémon, this attack does 10 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Discard Strength Charm at the end of the turn in which this Pokémon attacks.

name: Cover Fossil
rules: Look at the bottom 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Tirtouga you find there and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.text: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to Kadabra (1 if you have only 1).

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Mysterious Fossil
rules: Play Mysterious Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Mysterious Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (as well as a Trainer card). Mysterious Fossil has no attacks of its own, can't retreat, and can't be affected by any Special Conditions. If Mysterious Fossil is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Mysterious Fossil from play.

attacks.name: Aurora Gain
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rigidify

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Energy Charge
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, shuffle up to 2 Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

name: Fletchling
flavorText: Despite the beauty of its lilting voice, it's merciless to intruders that enter its territory.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Solrock

abilities.name: Sunlight

name: Lickilicky

attacks.text: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Lickichop
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.

name: Lillipup

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Megaton Fall
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: The same rocks that form its body have been found in ground layers around the world.

rules: Move a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tighten Up

attacks.name: Bubble

attacks.text: Return Shuppet and all cards attached to it to your hand. (If you don't have any Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.)

flavorText: It loves vengeful emotions and hangs in rows under the eaves of houses where vengeful people live.

name: Gabite

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Energy Restore
rules: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand. If you don't have that many basic Energy cards in your discard pile, put all of them into your hand.

name: Claw Fossil
rules: Play Claw Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play Claw Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (as well as a Trainer card). Claw Fossil has no attacks of its own, can't retreat, and can't be affected by any Special Conditions. If Claw Fossil is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Claw Fossil from play.

name: Latios

attacks.name: Break Through

attacks.name: Drill Run
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Straight Claw
attacks.text: You may discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Skarmory

attacks.name: Metal Sound
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Inkay

attacks.name: Constrict
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Water Pokémon or Basic Fighting Pokémon and, put it onto their Bench, and shuffle their deck.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Double Colorless Energy
rules:
Provides ColorlessColorless energy.
Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.
