abilities.text: Any damage done to Donphan by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Oran Berry
rules: Attach Oran Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.
At any time between turns, if the Pokémon this card is attached to has at least 2 damage counters on it, remove 2 damage counters from it. Then discard Oran Berry.

name: Full Heal
rules: Remove all Special Conditions from your Active Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Darkness Energy
rules: If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attack, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect unless the Attacking Pokémon is Darkness or has Dark in its name. Darkness Energy provides Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Hydreigon

abilities.name: Dark Trance
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Darkness Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragonblast
attacks.text: Discard 2 Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.

name: Super Rod
rules: Shuffle 3 in any combination of Pokémon and basic Energy cards from your discard pile back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Durant

attacks.name: Call for Backup
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Metal Jail
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Individuals each play different roles in driving Heatmor, their natural predator, away from their colony.

name: Comfey

abilities.name: Flower Shield
abilities.text: Each of your Pokémon that has any Fairy Energy attached to it can't be affected by any Special Conditions. Remove any Special Conditions affecting those Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sweet Kiss
attacks.text: Your opponent draws a card.

flavorText: It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flowers, and they give off an aromatic scent.

name: Jirachi

abilities.name: Stellar Wish
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may look at the top 5 cards of your deck, reveal a Trainer card you find there, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle the other cards back into your deck, and this Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It is said to have the ability to grant any wish for just one week every thousand years.

name: Holon Energy WP
rules: Holon Energy WP provides Colorless Energy.

If the Pokémon that Holon Energy WP is attached to also has a basic Water Energy card attached to it, prevent all effects of attacks, excluding damage, done to that Pokémon by your opponent's Pokémon. If the Pokémon that Holon Energy WP is attached to also has a basic Psychic Energy card attached to it, that Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 0. Ignore these effects if Holon Energy WP is attached to Pokémon-ex.

name: Alolan Exeggutor

attacks.name: Exeggutor's Paradise
attacks.text: For each of your Benched Exeggcute, search your deck for an Alolan Exeggutor or Alolan Exeggutor-GX and put it onto that Exeggcute to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Draco Meteor Barrage
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Grass Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Alola is the best environment for this Pokémon. Local people take pride in its appearance, saying this is how Exeggutor ought to look.

abilities.name: Fighting Tag
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Machamp is on your Bench, you may move all Fighting Energy attached to your Active Pokémon to Machamp. If you do, switch Machamp with your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crushing Punch
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Champ Buster
attacks.text: Does 100 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

name: Treecko

attacks.name: Energy Ball
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Treecko but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.text: Remove 1 damage counter from Treecko.

flavorText: The soles of its feet are covered by countless tiny spikes, enabling it to walk on walls and ceilings.

name: Zoroark BREAK
rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Zoroark BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Foul Play
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Rhyhorn

attacks.name: Stomp Off
attacks.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: Strong, but not too bright, this Pokémon can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging tackles.

name: Klefki

attacks.name: Metal Sound
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Fairy Lock
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It inserts its horn into chinks in metal, absorbing metal ions. For some reason, it collects keys.

name: Cinccino

attacks.name: Amazing Plea
attacks.text: Choose 2 cards from your discard pile. Then, ask your opponent if you may put them into your hand. If yes, put those cards into your hand. If no, this attack does 80 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.

name: Thought Wave Machine
rules: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, return an Energy card attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon to your opponent's hand. If the Pokémon has fewer attached Energy cards than that, return all of them to your opponent's hand. Your turn is over now (you don't get to attack).

name: Wash Rotom

abilities.name: Roto Motor
abilities.text: If you have 9 or more Pokémon Tool cards in your discard pile, ignore all Energy in the attack cost of each of this Pokémon's attacks.

attacks.name: Wash Arrow
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

name: Goomy

attacks.name: Bubble
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If head, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The weakest of all Dragon-type Pokémon, it's unable to breathe if its skin dries out, so it sticks to shady places.

name: Volkner's Philosophy
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
You may discard a card from your hand. Then, draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. (If you can't draw any cards, you can't play this card.)

name: Gloom

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Frustration
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that doesn't have any damage counters on it. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: The honey it drools from its mouth smells so atrocious, it can curl noses more than a mile away.

name: Darkness Energy
rules: If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Darkness Energy is attached to isn't Darkness. Darkness Energy provides Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Shroomish

attacks.name: Worry Seed
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: I wonder if I would look a little cuter with a beautiful flower?

name: Hoopa

attacks.name: Summoning Draw
attacks.text: If Pikachu is on your Bench, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It gathers things it likes and pushes them through its loop to teleport them to a secret place.

name: Swablu

attacks.name: Sing
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Run Around
attacks.text: You may switch Swablu with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It can't relax if it or its surroundings are not clean. It wipes off dirt with its wings.

name: Dragonite

attacks.name: Dragon Wave
attacks.text: Discard a Grass Energy and a Lightning Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Giant Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Incur the wrath of this normally calm Pokémon at your peril, because it will smash everything to smithereens before it's satisfied.

name: Metal Energy
rules: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Dark Metal Energy
rules: Attach Dark Metal Energy to 1 of your Pokémon. While in play, Dark Metal Energy provides Darkness Energy and Metal Energy, but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card when not in play and has no effect other than providing Energy.)

name: Mr. Mime

attacks.name: Trick
attacks.text: Move a Pokémon Tool card attached to 1 of either player's Pokémon to another of that player's Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If there is no Pokémon to move the Pokémon Tool card to, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Lock Up
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

name: Watchog

attacks.name: Held-Item Inspection
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Choose an Item card you find there. Your opponent shuffles that card into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Thorough Crunch
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

name: Rhydon

attacks.name: Rock Slide
attacks.text: This attack also does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Inkay

attacks.name: Disorderly Flip
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent's will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.

name: Bagon

abilities.name: Star Barrier
abilities.text: As long as Bagon has any Energy attached to it, Bagon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Dragon Rage
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.

name: Deoxys ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Form Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for another Deoxys ex and switch it with Deoxys ex. (Any cards attached to Deoxys ex, damage counters, Special Conditions, and effects on it are now on the new Pokémon.) If you do, put Deoxys ex on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward. You can't use more than 1 Form Change Poké-Power each turn.

attacks.name: Energy Burst
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Deoxys ex and the Defending Pokémon.

name: Tornadus

attacks.name: Energy Wheel
attacks.text: Move an Energy from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hurricane
attacks.text: Move a basic Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

name: Slowpoke

attacks.name: Spacing Out
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, remove a damage counter from Slowpoke. This attack can't be used if Slowpoke has no damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Scavenge
attacks.text: Discard 1 Psychic Energy card attached to Slowpoke in order to use this attack. Put a Trainer card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: Claw Fossil Anorith
rules: Look at the bottom 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal an Anorith you find there and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Spearow

attacks.name: Peck Bugs
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Grass Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Farmers whose fields are troubled by bug Pokémon appreciate Spearow for its vigorous appetite and look after it.

attacks.name: Super Speed
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Doduo.

name: Graveler

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: It climbs up cliffs as it heads toward the peak of a mountain. As soon as it reaches the summit, it rolls back down the way it came.

name: Health Energy
rules: Health Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove 1 damage counter from that Pokémon.

name: Poké Healer +
rules: You may play 2 Poké Healer + at the same time. If you play 1 Poké Healer +, remove 1 damage counter and a Special Condition from 1 of your Active Pokémon. If you play 2 Poké Healer +, remove 8 damage counters and all Special Conditions from 1 of your Active Pokémon.

name: Boost Energy
rules: Boost Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon. Discard Boost Energy at the end of the turn it was attached. Boost Energy provides ColorlessColorlessColorless Energy. The Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to can't retreat. If the Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to isn't an Evolved Pokémon, discard Boost Energy.

name: Bronzor

abilities.name: Evolutionary Advantage
abilities.text: If you go second, this Pokémon can evolve during your first turn.

flavorText: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

name: Rockruff
flavorText: When it rubs the rocks on its neck against you, that's proof of its love for you. However, the rocks are sharp, so the gesture is quite painful!

name: Honedge

attacks.name: Lucky Find
attacks.text: Search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

name: Xerneas-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Overrun
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Sanctuary-GX
attacks.text: Move all damage counters from each of your Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Sentret

attacks.name: Grope
attacks.text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Put the other card on the bottom of your deck.

flavorText: It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.

name: PokéDex HANDY909
rules: Shuffle your deck. Look at 6 cards from the top of your deck, then put them back on top of your deck in any order.

name: Black Kyurem-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Dragon Fang
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Freeze Shock
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

name: Dodrio

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Endeavor
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: An enemy that takes its eyes off any of the three heads—even for a second—will get pecked severely.

name: Flareon

attacks.name: Sand-Attack
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Fire Slash
attacks.text: You may discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Inhaled air is heated in the flame sac in its body to an intense fire over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: No Removal Gym
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.
A player must discard 2 cards from his or her hand in order to play an Energy Removal or Super Energy Removal card.

name: Raticate

abilities.name: Antibodies
abilities.text: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions. (Remove any Special Conditions affecting this Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dirty Shock
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Discard all Pokémon Tool cards attached to that Pokémon.

flavorText: The webs on its hind legs enable it to cross rivers. It searches wide areas for food.

name: Unown [L]

abilities.name: LINK
abilities.text: Unown L can use any attack from any Unown in play (both yours and your opponent's). (You still have to pay for that attack's Energy cost.)

attacks.name: Hidden Power
attacks.text: Search either player's discard pile for up to any 2 cards, show them to your opponent, and put them on top of that player's deck in any order you like.

flavorText: Shaped like ancient writing, it is a huge mystery whether language or UNOWN came first.

name: Tapu Koko-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Aero Trail
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may move any number of Lightning Energy from your other Pokémon to this Pokémon. If you do, switch this Pokémon with your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tapu Thunder-GX
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage times the amount of Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Bent Spoon
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Prevent all effects of your opponent's attacks, except damage, done to the Pokémon this card is attached to. (Existing effects are not removed.)
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: R Energy
rules: R Energy can be attached only to a Pokémon that has Dark or Rocket's in its name. While in play, R Energy provides 2 Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.) If the Pokémon R Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). When your turn ends, discard R Energy.

name: Skorupi

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.

name: Holon Research Tower
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Each player's basic Energy cards attached to Pokémon that has δ on its card are both their usual Energy type and Metal type but provide only 1 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.)

name: Gible

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.text: Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It skulks in caves, and when prey or an enemy passes by, it leaps out and chomps them. The force of its attack sometimes chips its teeth.

name: Tauros

attacks.name: Show Off
attacks.text: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Tauros does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Once it takes aim at its foe, it makes a headlong charge. It is famous for its violent nature.

name: Champions Festival
rules: Once during each player's turn, if that player has 6 Pokémon in play, he or she may heal 10 damage from each of his or her Pokémon.
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Life Herb
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). Remove all Special Conditions and 6 damage counters from that Pokémon (all if there are less than 6).

name: Ponyta

abilities.name: Star Barrier
abilities.text: As long as Ponyta has any Energy attached to it, Ponyta has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Blue Fire
attacks.text: Discard all Fire Energy attached to Ponyta.

flavorText: As a newborn, it can barely stand. However, through galloping, its legs are made tougher and faster.

name: Mysterious Fossil
rules: Play Mysterious Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Mysterious Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (instead of a Trainer card). Mysterious Fossil has no attacks of its own, can't retreat, and can't be affected by any Special Conditions. If Mysterious is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Mysterious Fossil from play.

name: Darkness Energy
rules: If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Darkness Energy is attached to isn't Darkness. Darkness Energy provides Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Galarian Sirfetch'd

attacks.name: Meteor Assault
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Meteor Assault again until it leaves the Active Spot.

flavorText: Only Farfetch'd that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon's leek withers, it will retire from combat.

name: Medicham ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Wise Aura
abilities.text: As long as Medicham ex is your Active Pokémon, each Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) (both yours and your opponent's) can't use any Poké-Powers.

attacks.name: Pure Power
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Sky Kick
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 60 damage plus 40 more damage.

name: Xtransceiver
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Lucario

abilities.name: Precognitive Aura
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have Garchomp in play, you may search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Missile Jab
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: They can detect the species of a living being—and its emotions—from over half a mile away. They control auras and hunt their prey in packs.

name: Girafarig

attacks.name: Get Lost
attacks.text: Put 2 cards from your opponent's discard pile in the Lost Zone.

attacks.name: Mind Shock
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent by biting.

attacks.name: Bubblebeam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

abilities.name: Rain Dance
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Water Pokémon. This power can't be used if Feraligatr is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hydro Crunch
attacks.text: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Emboar

abilities.name: Inferno Fandango
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Fire Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

name: Boost Energy
rules: Boost Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon. Discard Boost Energy at the end of the turn it was attached. Boost Energy provides ColorlessColorlessColorless Energy. The Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to can't retreat. If the Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to isn't an Evolved Pokémon, discard Boost Energy.

name: Black Kyurem-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Dragon Fang
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Freeze Shock
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

name: PlusPower
rules: During this turn, your Pokémon's attacks do 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Cobalion-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Righteous Edge
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Steel Bullet
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Jirachi ◇
rules: ◇ (Prism Star) Rule: You can't have more than 1 ◇ card with the same name in your deck. If a ◇ card would go to the discard pile, put it in the Lost Zone instead.

abilities.name: Wish Upon a Star
abilities.text: If you took this Pokémon as a face-down Prize card during your turn and your Bench isn't full, before you put it into your hand, you may put it onto your Bench and take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Perish Dream
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Asleep. At the end of your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon will be Knocked Out.

flavorText: It is said to have the ability to grant any wish for just one week every thousand years.

name: Sliggoo

attacks.name: Division
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Sliggoo and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It has trouble drawing a line between friends and food. It will calmly try to melt and eat even those it gets along well with.

name: Tornadus

attacks.name: Push Down
attacks.text: You may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Twister Throw
attacks.text: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

name: Jirachi ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Star Light
abilities.text: As long as your opponent has any Pokémon-ex or Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon in play, Jirachi ex pays Colorless less Energy to use Shield Beam or Super Psy Bolt.

attacks.name: Shield Beam
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, your opponent can't use any Poké-Powers on his or her Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Eerie Light
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Yveltal

abilities.name: Fright Night
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, each Pokémon Tool card in play has no effect.

attacks.name: Pitch-Black Spear
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon-EX. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

name: Cheren
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Charmander.

name: Trainers' Mail
rules: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Trainer card you find there (except Trainers' Mail) and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Counterattack Claws
rules: Attach Counterattack Claws to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

During your opponent's turn, if the Pokémon Counterattack Claws is attached to is your Active Pokémon and an opponent's attack damages it (even if it is Knocked Out), flip a coin. If heads, put 2 damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. Then, discard Counterattack Claws.

name: Rhyperior

attacks.name: Rock Tumble
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Bedrock Shake
attacks.text: This attack also does 60 damage to each Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It relies on its carapace to deflect incoming attacks and throw its enemy off balance. As soon as that happens, it drives its drill into the foe.

name: Nidoran ♀

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for Nidoran ♂ or Nidoran ♀ and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: While it does not prefer to fight, even one drop of the poison it secretes from barbs can be fatal.

name: Tornadus-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Windfall
attacks.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Jet Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Vulpix

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. Its tail splits from the tip as it grows older.

name: Cyclone Energy
rules: Cyclone Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to your Active Pokémon, switch 1 of the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Benched Pokémon to switch.

name: Battle Compressor Team Flare Gear
rules: Search your deck for up to 3 cards and discard them. Shuffle your deck afterward.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Marill
flavorText: The tip of its tail is filled with oil that is lighter than water, so it acts as a float.

name: Dialga

attacks.name: Time Rewind
attacks.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck.

flavorText: This Pokémon completely controls the flow of time. It uses its power to travel at will through the past and future.

name: Flygon

abilities.name: Labyrinth of Sand
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Active Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Desert Geyser
attacks.text: If your opponent has a Stadium in play, discard it. If you discarded a Stadium in this way, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon hides in the heart of sandstorms it creates and seldom appears where people can see it.

name: Bill's Teleporter
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, draw 4 cards.

abilities.name: Magnetic Draw
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. This power can't be used if Magnezone is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Lost Burn
attacks.text: Put as many Energy cards attached to your Pokémon as you like in the Lost Zone. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Energy cards put in the Lost Zone in this way.

name: Zweilous

attacks.name: Draw In
attacks.text: Attach 2 Darkness Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Since their two heads do not get along and compete with each other for food, they always eat too much.

name: Chaos Gym
rules: This card stays in play after being played. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Whenever a player plays a Trainer card other than a Stadium card, he or she flips a coin. If heads, that player plays that card normally. If tails, the player can't play that card. If the card isn't put into play, the player's opponent may use that card instead, if he or she does everything required in order to play that card (like discarding cards). Either way, the card goes to its owner's discard pile.

name: Gloom

attacks.name: Space Out
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters from Gloom. Gloom is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Stinky Nectar
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

flavorText: The honey it drools from its mouth smells so atrocious, it can curl noses more than a mile away.

name: Cosmoem

attacks.name: Stiffen
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 40 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: The king who ruled Alola in times of antiquity called it the "cocoon of the stars" and built an altar to worship it.

name: Diancie

attacks.name: Sparkling Wish
attacks.text: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Diamond Storm
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Fairy Pokémon.

flavorText: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

name: Poké Ball
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card, show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: δ Rainbow Energy
rules: δ Rainbow Energy provides Colorless Energy. While attached to a Pokémon that has δ on its card, δ Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.)

name: M Rayquaza-EX
rules: Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

ancientTrait.name: θ Max
ancientTrait.text: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes this Pokémon, heal all damage from it.

attacks.name: Emerald Break
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Bunnelby
flavorText: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Playful
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

flavorText: My Charmander is so rambunctious! I wonder if we can become good friends?

name: Chatot

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Nosedive
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Chatot does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its tongue is just like a human's. As a result, it can cleverly mimic human speech.

name: Charmeleon

attacks.name: Call for Support
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: My precious friend who is always with me. I have so many things I want to tell you.

name: The Rocket's Training Gym
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.
Each player pays Colorless more to retreat his or her Active Pokémon.

name: Poké Ball
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Solrock

abilities.name: Resistance Shade
abilities.text: If you have Lunatone in play, your opponent's Pokémon in play have no Resistance.

flavorText: When it rotates itself, it gives off light similar to the sun, thus blinding its foes.

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Houndour.

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Houndour.

name: Golem

attacks.name: Steamroller
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Heavy Slam
attacks.text: This attack does 20 less damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: When Golem grow old, they stop shedding their shells. Those that have lived a long, long time have shells green with moss.

name: Bronzong

abilities.name: Heatproof
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Fire Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shady Stamp
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Ancient people believed that petitioning Bronzong for rain was the way to make crops grow.

name: Torchic

attacks.name: Focus Energy
attacks.text: During your next turn, Torchic's Fire Shard attack's base damage is 80.

attacks.name: Fire Shard
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees F.

attacks.name: Sleep Inducer
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch the Defending Pokémon with it. The new Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Cherubi

attacks.name: Growth
attacks.text: Attach a Grass Energy from your hand to Cherubi.

flavorText: The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.

name: Energy Retrieval
rules: Put 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Sudowoodo

attacks.name: Double Draw
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: If a tree branch shakes when there is no wind, it's a Sudowoodo, not a tree. It hides from the rain.

name: Gardevoir Spirit Link
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Gardevoir-EX.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Spearow

attacks.name: Mirror Move
attacks.text: If Spearow was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Spearow to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

name: Lunala

abilities.name: Blessing of the Moone
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have Solgaleo in play, you may search your deck for up to 2 Energy cards and attach them to your Solgaleo or Lunala in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Records of it exist in writings from long, long ago, where it was known by the name "the beast that calls the moon."

name: White Kyurem-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Dragon Stream
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ice Burn
attacks.text: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon. The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Shinx

abilities.name: Star Barrier
abilities.text: As long as Shinx has any Energy attached to it, Shinx has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Payback
attacks.text: If your opponent has only 1 Prize card left, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage.

flavorText: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

name: Shellder

attacks.name: Shell Rest
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters from Shellder.

flavorText: It swims backwards by opening and closing its two shells. Its large tongue is always kept hanging out.

name: Gulpin

attacks.name: Amnesia
attacks.text: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Gastro Acid
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Almost all its body is its stomach. Its harsh digestive juices quickly dissolve anything it swallows.

name: Raticate BREAK
rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Raticate BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Super Fang
attacks.text: Put damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon until its remaining HP is 10.

name: Goomy

abilities.name: Sticky Membrane
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Pokémon's attacks cost Colorless more.

flavorText: Its source of protection is its slimy, germ-laden mucous membrane. Anyone who touches it needs some thorough hand-washing.

name: Nosepass
flavorText: It hunts without twitching a muscle by pulling in its prey with powerful magnetism. But sometimes it pulls natural enemies in close.

name: Warp Energy
rules: Warp Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to your Active Pokémon, switch that Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Cutiefly
flavorText: It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it's able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom.

name: Diggersby

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Hammer Arm
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: With their powerful ears, they can heft boulders of a ton or more with ease. They can be a big help at construction sites.

name: Pokémon Reversal
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with 1 of the Defending Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Defending Pokémon to switch.

name: Noibat
flavorText: They live in pitch black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.

name: Fearow

attacks.name: Devastating Wind
attacks.text: Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 3 cards.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike during your next turn.

flavorText: Drawings of a Pokémon resembling Fearow can be seen in murals from deep in ancient history.

name: Chandelure

abilities.name: Cursed Shadow
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Eerie Glow
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned and Confused.

flavorText: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

abilities.name: Leaf Trans
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Grass Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Meganium is affected by a Special Condition.

name: Tapu Lele-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Wonder Tag
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Energy Drive
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Tapu Cure-GX
attacks.text: Heal all damage from 2 of your Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: δ Rainbow Energy
rules: δ Rainbow Energy provides Colorless Energy. While attached to a Pokémon that has δ on its card, δ Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.)

name: Shedinja

abilities.name: Vessel of Life
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard all cards attached to this Pokémon and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon as a Pokémon Tool card. When the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 1 fewer Prize card.

attacks.name: Haunt
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: A most peculiar Pokémon that somehow appears in a Poké Ball when a Nincada evolves.

name: Chaos Tower
rules: Choose which way this card faces before you play it. This ↓ player's Pokémon can't be Confused or Poisoned. (If those Pokémon are already Confused or Poisoned, remove those Special Conditions.)
Choose which way this card faces before you play it. This ↓ player's Pokémon can't be Asleep or Paralyzed. (If those Pokémon are already Asleep or Paralyzed, remove those Special Conditions.)
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Pokémon Reversal
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent switches 1 of his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Metal Energy
rules: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Holon Researcher
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Discard a card from your hand. If you can't discard a card from your hand, you can't play this card.
Search your deck for a Metal Energy card or a Basic Pokémon (or Evolution card) that has δ on its card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Paras

attacks.name: Mushroom Tackle
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Mushrooms named tochukaso grow on its back. They grow along with the host PARAS.

name: Card-Flip Game
rules: Choose 1 of your opponent's face-down Prizes. Guess whether it is an Energy card, a Trainer card, or a Pokémon (Basic or Evolution) card. Flip the card face up (and leave it face up). If you guessed right, draw 2 cards.

name: Bianca
rules: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Honedge

attacks.name: Slashing Cutter
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

name: Metal Energy
rules: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Goodra

attacks.name: Power Whip
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to this Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Beat Slider
attacks.text: Your opponent switches their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: An amazingly friendly Pokémon, but if left to itself, loneliness overcomes it, and it oozes gooey tears.

name: Sneasel

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

flavorText: It feeds on eggs stolen from nests. Its sharply hooked claws rip vulnerable spots on prey.

name: Deoxys ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Form Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for another Deoxys ex and switch it with Deoxys ex. (Any cards attached to Deoxys ex, damage counters, Special Conditions, and effects on it are now on the new Pokémon.) If you do, put Deoxys ex on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward. You can't use more than 1 Form Change Poké-Power each turn.

attacks.name: Psyburst
attacks.text: You may discard 2 Energy attached to Deoxys ex. If you do, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Hydreigon

abilities.name: Dark Trance
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Darkness Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragonblast
attacks.text: Discard 2 Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.

name: Kyogre ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Flotation
abilities.text: As long as Kyogre ex has 1 Energy or less attached to it, the Retreat Cost for each of your Kyogre ex is 0.

attacks.name: Hydro Shot
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy attached to Kyogre ex. Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Charizard

attacks.name: Recall
attacks.text: Choose 1 of this Pokémon's attacks from its previous Evolutions and use it as this attack.

attacks.name: Combustion Blast
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Combustion Blast during your next turn.

flavorText: No matter what happens, if we stick together, we can get past it. Forever and ever.

name: Weedle

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp, venomous stinger on its head.

name: Gible

abilities.name: Rock Hiding
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Fighting Energy attached to it, it has no Retreat Cost.

flavorText: It skulks in caves, and when prey or an enemy passes by, it leaps out and chomps them. The force of its attack sometimes chips its teeth.

name: Root Fossil
rules: Play Root Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Root Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (instead of a Trainer card). Root Fossil has no attacks of its own, can't retreat, and can't be affected by any Special Conditions. If Root Fossil is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Root Fossil from play.

abilities.name: Spongy Stone
abilities.text: At any time between turns, remove 1 damage counter from Root Fossil.

name: Milotic ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Mystic Scale
abilities.text: As long as Milotic ex is in play, each player can't play any Technical Machine cards from his or her hand. Discard all Technical Machine cards in play (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Gentle Wrap
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.text: Move 1 basic Energy card attached to Milotic ex to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Heatran

attacks.name: Steelworks
attacks.text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck and attach any number of Metal Energy cards you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Steel Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: Boiling blood, like magma, circulates through its body. It makes its dwelling place in volcanic caves.

name: Float Stone
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
The Pokémon this card is attached to has no Retreat Cost.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Dimension Valley
rules: Each Psychic Pokémon's attacks (both yours and your opponent's) cost Colorless less.
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Erika's Kindness
rules: Remove 2 damage counters from each Pokémon (yours and your opponent's) with any damage counters on it. If a Pokémon has just 1 damage counter, remove it.

name: Volbeat

abilities.name: Light Conduct
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have Illumise in play, you may search your discard pile for a Supporter card, show it to your opponent, and put it on top of your deck. This power can't be used if Volbeat is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Firefly Light
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It communicates with others by lighting up its rear at night. It loves ILLUMISE's sweet aroma.

name: Ultra Ball
rules: Discard 2 cards from your hand. (If you can't discard 2 cards, you can't play this card.) Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: White Kyurem

attacks.name: Damage Rush
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Cold Fire
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: This legendary ice Pokémon waits for a hero to fill in the missing parts of its body with truth or ideals.

name: Sableye

ancientTrait.name: θ Stop
ancientTrait.text: Prevent all effects of your opponent's Pokémon's Abilities done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energy Hunt
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to your Benched Pokémon-EX in any way you like.

flavorText: It dwells in the darkness of caves. It uses its sharp claws to dig up gems to nourish itself.

name: Rocket's Articuno ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Darkness Veil
abilities.text: As long as Rocket's Articuno ex has any Darkness Energy attached to it, prevent all effects, except damage, by an opponent's attack done to Rocket's Articuno ex.

attacks.name: Freeze Solid
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a Water Energy card and attach it to Rocket's Articuno ex.

name: Azumarill

attacks.name: Bubble Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Superpower
attacks.text: You may do 30 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: The bubble-like pattern on its stomach helps it camouflage itself when it's in the water.

name: Cyclone Energy
rules: Cyclone Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to your Active Pokémon, switch 1 of the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Benched Pokémon to switch.

abilities.name: Lost Link
abilities.text: Mew can use the attacks of all Pokémon in the Lost Zone (both yours and your opponent's). (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

attacks.name: See Off
attacks.text: Search your deck for 1 Pokémon and put it in the Lost Zone. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Virizion

attacks.name: Double Draw
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Leaf Wallop
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Leaf Wallop attack does 40 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Its head sprouts horns as sharp as blades. Using whirlwind-like movements, it confounds and swiftly cuts opponents.

name: Tauros

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Seething Anger
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each damage counter on this Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: After heightening its will to fight by whipping itself with its three tails, it charges at full speed.

name: Bronzor

attacks.name: Payback
attacks.text: If your opponent has only 1 Prize card left, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

name: Crawdaunt ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Splash Back
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if your opponent has 4 or more Benched Pokémon, you may choose 1 of them and return that Pokémon and all cards attached to it to his or her hand. This power can't be used if Crawdaunt ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Power Blow
attacks.text: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to Crawdaunt ex.

name: Entei

abilities.name: Extreme Speed
abilities.text: Entei's Retreat Cost is Colorless Energy less for each Fire Energy attached to Entei.

attacks.name: Wild Blaze
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

flavorText: A Pokémon that races across the land. It is said that one is born every time a new volcano appears.

name: Lycanroc
flavorText: They live alone without forming packs. They will only listen to orders from Trainers who can draw out their true power.

name: Vaporeon

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.text: Does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.text: Recover 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can melt away into water.

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Charmeleon.

name: Premier Ball
rules: Search your deck or your discard pile for a Pokémon LV.X, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. If you search your deck, shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Magnetic Storm
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.
Any damage done by attacks from Psychic Pokémon and Fighting Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) is not affected by Resistance.

name: Blaine's Last Resort
rules: You can't play this card if you have any cards in your hand other than Blaine's Last Resort. Show your hand to your opponent, then draw 5 cards.

name: Heatran

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Boiling Impact
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Boiling blood, like plasma, circulates through its body. It makes its dwelling place in volcanic caves.

name: Druddigon

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It runs through the narrow tunnels formed by Excadrill and Onix. It uses its sharp claws to catch prey.

name: Dark Claw
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
If this card is attached to a Darkness Pokémon, each of the attacks of that Pokémon does 20 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Energy Amplifier
rules: Choose an Energy card in your hand, show it to your opponent, and shuffle it into your deck. Then flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards. Show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: SP Energy
rules: SP Energy provides Colorless Energy. If the Pokémon SP Energy is attached to is a Pokémon SP, SP Energy provides every type of Energy buy provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Victini

abilities.name: Victory Star
abilities.text: Once during your turn, after you flip any coins for an attack, you may ignore all effects of those coin flips and being flipping those coins again. You can't use more than 1 Victory Star Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Stored Power
attacks.text: Move all Energy attached to this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: Drampa

attacks.name: Amass
attacks.text: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Power Cyclone
attacks.text: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it will completely destroy its surroundings with its intense breath.

name: Kangaskhan

attacks.name: Cross-Cut
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Hurricane Punch
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Kangaskhan's maternal love is so deep that it will brave death to protect its offspring.

name: Ferroseed

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It absorbs the iron it finds in the rock while clinging to the ceiling. It shoots spikes when in danger.

name: Flareon-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Fire Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blaze Ball
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Brock's Training Method
rules: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card with Brock in its name. Show that card to your opponent, then put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Azumarill

ancientTrait.name: α Recovery
ancientTrait.text: When this Pokémon is healed, double the amount healed.

attacks.name: Tail Rap
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Dwindling Wave
attacks.text: This attack does 100 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: The bubble-like pattern on its stomach helps it camouflage itself when it's in the water.

name: Meditite

attacks.name: Yoga Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It eats just one berry a day. By enduring hunger, its spirit is tempered and made sharper.

name: Wally
rules: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-EX) and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Recover Energy
rules: Recover Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove all Special Conditions from that Pokémon.

name: Holon Ruins
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.
Each player that has any Pokémon in play that has δ on its card may draw a card once during his or her turn. If the player does, he or she discards a card from his or her hand.

name: Doublade

attacks.name: Slashing Cutter
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.

name: Ferrothorn

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Thorn Pod Throw
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. You can't do more than 100 damage to a Benched Pokémon in this way. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: They attach themselves to cave ceilings, firing steel spikes at targets passing beneath them.

name: Garchomp LV.X
rules: Put this card onto your Active Garchomp. Garchomp LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

abilities.name: Dragon Pulse
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Garchomp LV.X from your hand onto your Active Garchomp, you may flip 3 coins. For each heads, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Restore
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a Pokémon (excluding Pokémon LV.X) and put it onto your Bench as a Basic Pokémon. Then, you may search your discard pile for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to that Pokémon.

name: Jangmo-o

abilities.name: Bulletproof
abilities.text: This Pokémon takes 10 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives.

name: Gardevoir-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Life Leap
attacks.text: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shining Wind
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Super Singe
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Goomy

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its source of protection is its slimy, germ-laden mucous membrane. Anyone who touches it needs some thorough hand-washing.

name: Shellos East Sea

attacks.name: Shell Hunting
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 in any combination of Shellos West Sea and Shellos East Sea and put them on your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.

name: Mew ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Psychic Vision
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Mew ex is on your Bench, you may look at your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Devo Crush
attacks.text: You may discard 2 Energy attached to Mew ex. If you do, you may remove the highest Stage Evolution card from the Defending Pokémon and shuffle that card into your opponent's deck.

name: Type: Null

attacks.name: Armor Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.

name: Wide Lens
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Damage from the attacks of the Pokémon this card is attached to is affected by Weakness and Resistance for your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Solgaleo

abilities.name: Full Metal Body
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Metal Energy attached to it, it has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Rising Dash
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.

name: Sableye

attacks.name: Quick Hunt
attacks.text: If you go first, you can use this attack on your first turn. Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Cursed Drop
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: This Pokémon is feared. When its gemstone eyes begin to glow with a sinister shine, it's believed that Sableye will steal people's spirits away.

name: Pichu

abilities.name: Baby Evolution
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Pikachu from your hand onto Pichu (this counts as evolving Pichu) and remove all damage counters from Pichu.

attacks.name: Chupi
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: The electric pouches on its cheeks are still small. They cannot store much electricity yet.

name: Black Kyurem-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Black Ballista
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Dunsparce

attacks.name: Glare
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Second Bite
attacks.text: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When spotted, this Pokémon escapes backwards by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.

name: Absol ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Cursed Eyes
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you put Absol ex from your hand onto your Bench, you may move 3 damage counters from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon to another of his or her Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psychic Pulse
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Mudbray
flavorText: Loads weighing up to 50 times as much as its own body weight pose no issue for this Pokémon. It's skilled at making use of mud.

attacks.name: Collect Fire
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your discard pile for 2 Fire Energy cards and attach them to Charizard (1 if there is only 1).

attacks.name: Flame Pillar
attacks.text: You may discard a Fire Energy card attached to Charizard. If you do, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and do 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Dunsparce

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.

name: Celadon City Gym
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

During each player's turn, that player may choose to discard an Energy card attached to 1 of his or her Pokémon with Erika in its name. If that player does so, that Pokémon is no longer Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned.

name: Groudon

attacks.name: Volcano Stomp
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard the top 4 cards of your opponent's deck. If tails, discard the top 4 cards of your deck.

flavorText: Said to have expanded the lands by evaporating water with raging heat. It battled titanically with Kyogre.

name: Pokédex
rules: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck and put them back on top of your deck in any order.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Gold Berry
rules: Attach Gold Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

At any time between turns, if there are at least 4 damage counters on the Pokémon Gold Berry is attached to, you may remove 4 of them and discard Gold Berry. At the start of each turn, if there are at least 4 damage counters on the Pokémon Gold Berry is attached to, remove 4 of them and discard Gold Berry.

name: Hydreigon

attacks.name: Consume
attacks.text: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Destructor Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.

name: Raichu ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Rai-shield
abilities.text: Damage done to any of your Raichu ex in play by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon-ex is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). You can't use more than 1 Rai-shield Poké-Body each turn.

attacks.name: Power Short
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If that Pokémon has Poké-Powers, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Celebi

ancientTrait.name: θ Stop
ancientTrait.text: Prevent all effects of your opponent's Pokémon's Abilities done to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Leap Through Time
abilities.text: When this Pokémon is Knocked Out, flip a coin. If heads, shuffle this Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your deck, and your opponent can't take any Prize cards for it.

attacks.name: Sparkle Motion
attacks.text: Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavorText: It has the power to travel across time, but it is said to appear only in peaceful times.

name: Dark Patch
rules: Attach a basic Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Darkness Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Multi Energy
rules: Attach Multi Energy to 1 of your Pokémon. While in play, Multi Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card when not in play.) Multi energy provides Colorless Energy when attached to a Pokémon that already has Special Energy cards attached to it.

name: Hitmonchan

attacks.name: Counter Punch
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if Hitmonchan is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Hitmonchan is Knocked Out), put 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gut Strike
attacks.text: If Tyrogue is anywhere under Hitmonchan, this attack's base damage is 60 instead of 30.

flavorText: The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting.

name: Arceus
rules: You may have as many of this card in your deck as you like.

attacks.name: Prize Count
attacks.text: If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, this attack does 20 damage plus 60 more damage.

flavorText: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.

name: Computer Search
rules: Discard 2 of the other cards from your hand in order to search your deck for any card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Warp Energy
rules: Warp Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to your Active Pokémon, switch that Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Rocket's Entei ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dark Condition
abilities.text: As long as Rocket's Entei ex has any Darkness Energy attached to it, Rocket's Entei ex has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Energy Link
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for an Energy card and attach it to Rocket's Entei ex.

attacks.name: Volcanic Ash
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy attached to Rocket's Entei ex and then choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 60 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Snorunt
flavorText: What a delicious-looking snowman! I think I'll sneak a bite. It's OK…no one's looking, right?

name: Ribombee

abilities.name: Honey Gather
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for up to 2 basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.

name: Cheren
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Squirtle

attacks.name: Bubble
