attacks.name: Prominence-GX
attacks.text: Heal all damage from all of your Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Galactic HQ
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.
Whenever any player plays any Pokémon from his or her hand to evolve his or her Pokémon, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

name: Meganium ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Nurture and Heal
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Grass Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, remove 1 damage counter from that Pokémon. This power can't be used if Meganium ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Power Poison
attacks.text: Discard 1 Energy attached to Meganium ex. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Mail from Bill
rules: You can't play this card if you have 5 or more cards in your hand (including this one). Draw cards until you have exactly 4 cards in your hand.

name: Rocket's Suicune ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dark and Clear
abilities.text: As long as Rocket's Suicune ex has any Darkness Energy attached to it, Rocket's Suicune ex can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Icy Wind
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Hyper Splash
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon, this attack does 50 damage plus 40 more damage.

name: Energy Switch
rules: Move a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Charizard ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Energy Flame
abilities.text: All Energy attached to Charizard ex are Fire Energy instead of its usual type.

attacks.name: Burn Down
attacks.text: Discard 5 Fire Energy attached to Charizard ex. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, and any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Wailord ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Super Deep Dive
attacks.text: If you don't have any Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing. Remove 3 damage counters from Wailord ex. Switch Wailord ex with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dwindling Wave
attacks.text: Does 100 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Wailord ex.

name: Bianca
rules: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Chansey ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Healing Egg
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters (1 if there is only 1) from each of your Pokémon. Remove no damage counters from Chansey ex.

attacks.name: Double-edge
attacks.text: Chansey ex does 60 damage to itself.

name: Porygon

attacks.name: Code Check
attacks.text: Look at 1 of your opponent's face-down Prize cards.

flavorText: Roughly 20 years ago, it was artificially created, utilizing the latest technology of the time.

name: Alolan Ninetales

abilities.name: Luminous Barrier
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon by your opponent's Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX.

flavorText: It creates drops of ice in its coat and showers them over its enemies. Anyone who angers it will be frozen stiff in an instant.

name: Quagsire
flavorText: It has a sluggish nature. It lies at the river's bottom, waiting for prey to stray into its mouth.

name: Registeel ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Exoskeleton
abilities.text: Any damage done to Registeel ex by attacks is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Steel Wave
attacks.text: Does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon of the same type as the Defending Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Lillipup
flavorText: The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.

name: All-Night Party
rules: Once during each player's turn, if that player's Active Pokémon is Asleep, he or she may remove that Special Condition and heal 30 damage from that Pokémon.
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Mismagius GL LV.X
rules: Put this card onto your Active Mismagius GL. Mismagius GL LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

abilities.name: Magical Return
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may return a Pokémon Tool or Technical Machine card attached to your Pokémon to your hand. This power can't be used if Mismagius GL is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Darkness Magic
attacks.text: Count the number of cards in your hand. Put that many damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. You can't put more than 8 damage counters in this way.

name: Bidoof

attacks.name: Bang Heads
attacks.text: Both this Pokémon and the Defending Pokémon are now Confused.

flavorText: A comparison revealed that Bidoof's front teeth grow at the same rate as Rattata's.

name: Shining Celebi
rules: You can't have more than 1 Shining Celebi in your deck.

attacks.name: Healing Water
attacks.text: Remove a number of damage counters from 1 of your Benched Pokémon equal to the number of Water Energy cards attached to Shining Celebi. If the Pokémon has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Miracle Leaf
attacks.text: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon. If you get 1 or more heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep, Confused, or Poisoned (your choice).

flavorText: It is worshipped as a god of the forest. It appears only in undisturbed old-growth forests.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Gaze
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Arceus
rules: You may have as many of this card in your deck as you like.

attacks.name: Metal Barrier
attacks.text: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Arceus by Pokémon LV.X during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

name: Cedric Juniper
rules: Put a Pokémon from your hand face down in front of you and tell your opponent its name. Your opponent guesses the height of that Pokémon. Reveal that Pokémon. If your opponent guessed right, he or she draws 3 cards. If your opponent guessed wrong, you draw 3 cards. Return the Pokémon to your hand. (You can't choose a Pokémon that doesn't have the height printed on the card.)
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Yveltal

attacks.name: Oblivion Wing
attacks.text: Attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Darkness Blade
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: Hidden away in its jet-black wings is a red passion.

name: Electabuzz ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Solgaleo-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Shining Mane
abilities.text: Your Pokémon in play have no Weakness.

attacks.name: Turbo Strike
attacks.text: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Prominence-GX
attacks.text: Heal all damage from all of your Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Gligar

abilities.name: Free Flight
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has no Energy attached to it, it has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Shinobi Strike
attacks.text: If you played Janine from your hand during this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It usually clings to cliffs. When it spots its prey, it spreads its wings and glides down to attack.

name: Mimikyu

attacks.name: Filch
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Copycat
attacks.text: If your opponent's Pokémon used an attack that isn't a GX attack during their last turn, use it as this attack.

flavorText: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.

name: Holon Energy GL
rules: Holon Energy GL provides Colorless Energy.

If the Pokémon that Holon Energy GL is attached to also has a basic Grass Energy card attached to it, that Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions. If the Pokémon that Holon Energy GL is attached to also has a basic Lightning Energy card attached to it, damage done by your opponent's Pokémon-ex is reduced by 10. Ignore these effects if Holon Energy GL is attached to Pokémon-ex.

name: Latias ex δ
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Fellow Boost
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a basic Energy card from your hand to your Latias, Latias ex, Latios, or Latios ex. If you do, your turn ends. This power can't be used if Latias ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Power Crush
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out by this attack, discard 2 Fire Energy attached to Latias ex.

name: Geodude

attacks.name: Focus Fist
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: At rest, it looks just like a rock. Carelessly stepping on it will make it swing its fists angrily.

name: Porygon2

attacks.name: Calculate
attacks.text: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

flavorText: For the purposes of planetary development, Porygon was updated with the most cutting-edge technology available.

name: Steelix-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Wild Edge
attacks.text: You may do 50 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 100 damage times the number of heads.

name: Silicobra
flavorText: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.

name: Sunkern

attacks.name: Sun Soak
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, remove all damage counters from Sunkern, search your deck for an Evolution card that evolves from Sunkern, and put it onto Sunkern. (This counts as evolving Sunkern.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It suddenly falls out of the sky in the morning. A year after a cold summer, their population explodes.

name: Sabrina
rules: Take all Energy cards attached to 1 of your Pokémon with Sabrina in its name and attach them to another 1 of your Pokémon with Sabrina in its name.

name: Level Max
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon LV.X that levels up from 1 of your Pokémon, and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as leveling up that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Smash Punch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Fling
attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

name: Hydreigon-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dragon Road
abilities.text: If there is any Stadium card in play, the Retreat Cost of each of your Dragon Pokémon in play is ColorlessColorless less.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Snover

attacks.name: Curiosity
attacks.text: Look at your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Snowball Fight
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Snover does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.

name: Grimer

attacks.name: Stomp Off
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: The wastewater coming from factories is clean these days, so Grimer have nothing to eat. They're said to be on the verge of extinction.

name: Rayquaza

attacks.name: Inferno Spear
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy and a Lightning Energy attached to Rayquaza.

flavorText: It flies in the ozone layer, way up high in the sky. Until recently, no one had ever seen it.

name: Poipole

attacks.name: Last Scene
attacks.text: If each player has exactly 1 Prize card remaining, this attack does 130 more damage.

flavorText: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

name: Togepi

attacks.name: Attract Smack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It transforms the kindness and joy of others into happiness, which it stores in its shell.

name: Super Energy Removal
rules: Discard 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your own Pokémon in order to choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and up to 2 Energy cards attached to it. Discard those Energy cards.

name: Florges BREAK
rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Florges BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

abilities.name: Floral Breeze
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may heal 30 damage and remove a Special Condition from your Active Pokémon.

name: Vibrava

abilities.name: Obnoxious Whirring
abilities.text: Whenever your opponent plays a Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It vibrates its wings to generate ultrasonic waves, causing its prey to faint. Then it buries the prey alive in the sand to preserve it.

name: Manectric Spirit Link
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Manectric-EX.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Lusamine
rules: Put 2 in any combination of Supporter and Stadium cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Raichu LV.X
rules: Put this card onto your Active Raichu. Raichu LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

abilities.name: Link Lightning
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you put Raichu LV.X onto Raichu and use Voltage Shoot, you may use another attack of Raichu afterward. This power can't be used if Raichu is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Voltage Shoot
attacks.text: Discard 2 Lightning Energy cards from your hand and choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Jolteon ★
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

abilities.name: Yellow Ray
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you put Jolteon Star from your hand onto your Bench, you may put 1 damage counter on each Active Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Jolteon Star during your opponent's next turn.

name: Herdier

attacks.name: Jump On
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: This very loyal Pokémon helps Trainers, and it also takes care of other Pokémon.

name: Korrina
rules: Search your deck for a Fighting Pokémon and an Item card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Shelgon

attacks.name: Raging Blade
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: They lurk deep within caves—motionless, neither eating nor drinking. Why they don't die is not known.

name: Lass's Special
rules: Draw a card for each of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Carkol
flavorText: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.

name: Snorlax

abilities.name: Block
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Active Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Teampact
attacks.text: Does 30 damage times the number of Team Plasma Pokémon you have in play.

flavorText: When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.

name: Clefable ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Metronome
attacks.text: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy cost. (You must still do anything else in order to use that attack.) (No matter what type that Pokémon is, Clefable ex's type is still Colorless.) Clefable ex performs that attack.

name: Rocket's Zapdos ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Darkness Guard
abilities.text: As long as Rocket's Zapdos ex has any Darkness Energy attached to it, damage done to Rocket's Zapdos ex by an opponent's attack is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Plasma
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to Rocket's Zapdos ex.

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Random Receiver
rules: Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Supporter card. Put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Chandelure

attacks.name: Cursed Drop
attacks.text: Put 4 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Vortex of Pain
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on all of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavorText: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.

name: Rocket's Raikou ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Lightning Burst
abilities.text: Whenever you attach a Darkness Energy card from your hand to Rocket's Raikou ex, you may choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon and switch it with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Benched Pokémon to switch. This power can't be used if Rocket's Raikou ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Thunderous Blow
attacks.text: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Lightning Energy attached to Rocket's Raikou ex.

name: Mewtwo-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Energy Absorption
attacks.text: Attach an Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Regeneration
attacks.text: Heal 60 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Heatran-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Heat Boiler
attacks.text: If this Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Dynamite Press
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, this attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Politoed ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Upward Lick
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. If that Pokémon is a Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon, this attack does 50 damage instead. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Punch and Run
attacks.text: Switch Politoed ex with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Swallow Up
attacks.text: Before doing damage, count the remaining HP of the Defending Pokémon and Politoed ex. If the Defending Pokémon has fewer remaining HP than Politoed ex's, this attack does 120 damage instead.

name: Nosepass

attacks.name: Nose Poke
attacks.text: If Probopass is on your Bench, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: Its nose is a magnet. As a result, this Pokémon always keeps its face pointing north.
